title: Add focused proof lane for contract and inventory changes
goal: Implement #543 by routing contract/schema/inventory-check-only changes to focused validation before broad workspace CLI proof.
Keep mixed runtime or CLI changes broad and conservative.
non_goals: Do not weaken proof for src/agentic_workspace/cli.py or runtime behavior changes.
Do not add a new command.
Do not add repo-specific path exceptions.

intent.outcome: proof selection helps agents finish contract/check-only work with the smallest defensible validation lane
intent.constraints: implementation-agnostic; existing proof command; broaden on mixed runtime paths
intent.latitude: may update proof selection contracts, defaults rendering, focused tests, and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if proof selection cannot distinguish contract data from runtime paths without brittle repo-specific logic

execution.proof: passed: focused proof selector tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling, structured inventory, planning surfaces, planning doctor, root CLI authority

invariants: runtime CLI edits still select workspace_cli and cli_authority
generated command package outputs still route to generated package proof
cross-lane changes still carry escalation guidance

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: dogfood package feedback immediately after each slice

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: Return to #540 after #543 unless new blocking dogfooding friction appears.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: bounded implementation of proof selector tuning
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: no new command; no weaker proof for runtime paths; no repo-specific assumptions
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: specific lane name, command list, and tests
delegated_judgment.escalate when: matching requires brittle negative path rules

iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The package feedback loop worked quickly: the #539 closeout signal became #543, then a focused proof lane was implemented before returning to background lane work.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Contract/check-only paths now select contract_tooling without full workspace CLI proof; mixed contract plus CLI paths still broaden and escalate.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py
completion_criteria: Contract/check-only changed paths select focused contract tooling proof instead of full workspace CLI proof.
Mixed contract plus runtime CLI paths still select broad proof and escalation.
#543 closes and planning state returns to #540.

execution_run.what happened: Added a contract_tooling proof lane and proof-selection rules for contract/schema/inventory/check-only paths; mixed runtime CLI paths still select workspace_cli and cli_authority.
execution_run.scope touched: proof selection contract, defaults rendering, tests, planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: proof_selection_rules and proof output validation lanes
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py::test_proof_changed_selector_routes_contract_only_changes_to_focused_lane tests/test_workspace_cli.py::test_proof_changed_selector_broadens_contract_plus_cli_changes -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success
execution_run.next step: archive plan, close #543, commit, then continue #540

finished_run_review.config compliance: used proof_selection contract rather than hard-coded repo-specific path exceptions

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: focused and broadened proof selector tests passed; full workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling, structured inventory, planning surfaces, planning doctor, and root CLI authority passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Add focused proof lane for contract and inventory-only changes.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: contract/check-only proof query now selects contract_tooling and omits workspace CLI tests; mixed CLI changes remain broad

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #543 is complete, but the workflow-friction-polish parent lane still has other open issues and the active work should return to #540.
closure_check.reopen trigger: contract/check-only paths again require full workspace CLI proof without runtime behavior changes

durable_residue.learned constraint: proof selection should distinguish stable contract/check changes from runtime CLI behavior
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: lower repeated proof cost without lowering confidence

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Proof selection now has a focused lane for contract/check-only changes.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused proof selector tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling, structured inventory, planning surfaces, planning doctor, and root CLI authority passed
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): proof_selection_rules contract updated; no Memory promotion needed

signals found: The package helped finish #543 quickly because #543 came from a concrete proof output mismatch; no additional feature is needed beyond this tuning.
signals dismissed: No further issue created: the remaining manual execplan authoring friction is already covered by #515/#531.
